title: If Clauses / Conditionals Part 2 — Second & Third Conditional
tagline: If Clauses / Conditionals Part 2 — Second & Third Conditional को सही तरीके से समझें और बोलें।
summary: If Clauses / Conditionals Part 2 — Second & Third Conditional का सही उपयोग आपकी English को ज़्यादा natural और fluent बनाता है। Formula: Second: If + past simple, would + base verb (unreal present/future) | Third: If + past perfect, would have + V3 (unreal past)
